name: Lansdowne Oil & Gas plc
summary: Lansdowne Oil & Gas plc, an independent oil and gas company, focuses on the exploration and development of oil and gas reserves in the Irish Celtic Sea. The company holds rights in the Helvick and the 1/11 Barryroe exploration licenses located in the North Celtic Sea basin of the south coast of Ireland. Lansdowne Oil & Gas plc was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Dublin, Ireland.
